service.name: Philips Hue API
service.description_for_ai: Control Philips Hue smart lights locally via bridge. Turn lights on/off, change color, brightness, color temperature. Automations and scenes. Works on local network — no cloud needed.

auth.note: Local API key generated by pressing bridge button then calling /api endpoint
auth.how_to_get: Press bridge button → POST http://{bridge_ip}/api with devicetype

capabilities.description_for_ai: Control a Hue light: on/off, brightness, color (hue/saturation), color temperature, alerts.

ct.description: Color temperature in mirek 153-500 (cool to warm)

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get all Philips Hue lights with their current state: on/off, brightness, color, reachability.

agent_hints.local: This API runs locally on your network — no internet required. Bridge IP from hue app settings.
agent_hints.color_tip: For red: hue=0, sat=254. Green: hue=25500, sat=254. Blue: hue=46920, sat=254. White: sat=0.
agent_hints.discovery: Find bridge IP via https://discovery.meethue.com or check router.
agent_hints.discover: Find bridge IP: https://discovery.meethue.com or check router DHCP list for device named 'Philips hue'.
agent_hints.first_use: First time: 1) Press bridge button. 2) POST http://{bridge_ip}/api with body {devicetype:'myapp#mydevice'} within 30s. 3) Save returned username.
